recommendations.title: Memento Mori
recommendations.overview: The ghost of a lesbian high-school girl takes revenge on the people who used to bully her. And another young girl finds her old diary detailing her love and rejection when she was alive.

recommendations.title: The 8th Night
recommendations.overview: With prayer beads in one hand and an ax in the other, a monk hunts down a millennia-old spirit that's possessing humans and unleashing hell on Earth.

recommendations.title: Unlocked
recommendations.overview: A woman's life is turned upside-down when a dangerous man gets a hold of her lost cell phone and uses it to track her every move.

recommendations.title: Cyborg She
recommendations.overview: A lonely university student develops a romance with a beautiful interesting woman, who turns out to be a cyborg from the future.

recommendations.title: My Sassy Girl
recommendations.overview: A dweeby, mild-mannered man comes to the aid of a drunk young woman on a subway platform. Little does he know how much trouble he’s in for.

recommendations.title: The Father
recommendations.overview: A man refuses all assistance from his daughter as he ages and, as he tries to make sense of his changing circumstances, he begins to doubt his loved ones, his own mind and even the fabric of his reality.

recommendations.title: Wall to Wall
recommendations.overview: A man who poured his life savings into a new apartment discovers its walls are full of disturbing noises, hostile neighbors and unsettling secrets.

recommendations.title: The Roundup 2
recommendations.overview: The 'Beast Cop' Ma Seok-do heads to a foreign country to extradite a suspect, but soon after his arrival, he discovers additional murder cases and hears about a vicious killer who has been committing crimes against tourists for several years.

recommendations.title: Project Silence
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Action, Horror, Science Fiction, Adventure

recommendations.title: A Year-End Medley
